canonical_definition: Polish preference dataset containing human-annotated response ratings, rankings, and multi-turn dialogues for evaluating alignment in Polish LLMs.
papers: REALM: Recursive Relevance Modeling forLLM-based Document Re-Ranking

definitions.paper: REALM: Recursive Relevance Modeling forLLM-based Document Re-Ranking

definitions.text: A Polish-language dataset of human-preferred response pairs used to evaluate and train language models on alignment with human preferences.

relationships.paper: REALM: Recursive Relevance Modeling forLLM-based Document Re-Ranking
relationships.evidence: For scalar multi-attribute rating, annotators evaluated each response on a 5-point Likert scale across seven criteria: i) truthfulness, (ii) linguistic correctness, (iii) safety, (iv) fairness, (v) conciseness, (vi) coherence & reasoning, as well as vii) helpfulness & instruction-following.
